configurations.name: 🚀 Dev Server
configurations.detail: Start Vite dev server at localhost:5173 with HMR

configurations.name: 🔍 Dev Server (Debug)
configurations.detail: Launch Chrome with DevTools attached — auto-starts dev server, set breakpoints in VS Code

configurations.name: 📦 Preview Build
configurations.detail: Build for production then serve dist/ locally — verify production bundle before deploy

configurations.name: 🧪 Run Tests
configurations.detail: Run all Vitest tests once and exit

configurations.name: 🧪 Tests (Watch)
configurations.detail: Run Vitest in watch mode — re-runs on file changes

configurations.name: 📊 Test Coverage
configurations.detail: Run tests with V8 coverage — open coverage/index.html for the report

configurations.name: 🔬 Debug Current Test File
configurations.detail: Run only the currently open test file with verbose output — great for debugging a single spec
